description.value:
Frequency once per day

While the memories of most enshrined vesk are hazy and ephemeral, with some concentration you can recall memories of your amalgamated souls vividly enough to apply your experiences.

Choose one skill. You temporarily increase your proficiency rank with that skill by one step for 1 minute (from untrained to trained, trained to expert, and expert to master). This temporary increase adjusts your proficiency bonus and allows you to use skill actions based on this increased proficiency as normal. Memories of Valor can't increase a skill's proficiency rank beyond master.
